title: February 3
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 3''' is the 34th day of the year. There are 331 days remaining, (332 in leap years).</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Trisha Noble]] is born.
*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[Jimmy Vee]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Paul Venables]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Warwick Davis]] is born.
*[[1997]] – ''[[The Haunted Village]]'' released on VHS.
*1997 – ''[[The Pirates and the Prince]]'' released on VHS.
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Requiem for a Rogue (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Requiem for a Rogue'' trade paperback]] published.
*1999 – ''[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 6]]'' published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' published.
*2004 – ''[[Fool's Bargain]]'' published.
*[[2006]] – [[What's The Story?]] Round 4 published in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]].
*[[2010]] – ''[[Star Wars Adventures: Luke Skywalker and the Treasure of the Dragonsnakes]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – "[[The Box]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2015]] – ''[[Sabine My Rebel Sketchbook]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[The Secret Jedi: The Adventures of Kanan Jarrus: Rebel Leader]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Obi-Wan and Anakin 2|''Obi-Wan and Anakin'' 2]] published.
*2016 – "[[Legends of the Lasat]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*2016 – [[Joe Alaskey]] dies.
*[[2019]] – "[[The First Order Occupation]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2021]] – [[The High Republic (2021) 2|''The High Republic'' 2]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars (2020) 11|''Star Wars'' (2020) 11]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2020) 3|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2020) 3]] published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2021) 1|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2021) 1]] published.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars Outlaws: Low Red Moon]]'' published.
*2026 – [[Star Wars Outlaws: Low Red Moon (audiobook)|''Star Wars Outlaws: Low Red Moon'' audiobook]] released.
*2026 – ''[[Resistance Reborn]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2026 – ''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story: Expanded Edition]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2026 – ''[[The Art of Star Wars: The Acolyte]]'' published.
*2026 – ''[[The High Republic: Trials of the Jedi]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: Deluxe Paper Dolls]]'' published.
